subject: Outlook stuck on Loading Profile
description: Outlook desktop spins on 'Loading Profile' for ten-plus minutes after login.

ts_steps.title: End Office processes
ts_steps.action: Task Manager — end OUTLOOK.EXE, teams if integrated; relaunch Outlook.

ts_steps.title: Safe mode
ts_steps.action: Run outlook.exe /safe — if loads, disable add-ins one by one from File → Options → Add-ins.

ts_steps.title: Recreate profile
ts_steps.action: Control Panel → Mail → Show Profiles — new profile, add account; migrate PST if needed.

internal_information: Corrupt profile, add-in crash loop, or OST integrity. Scanpst/OST repair tools per Microsoft KB if supported.
